items.title: Coders are refusing to work without AI — and that could come back to bite them
items.summary: While AI is helping coders produce code faster, it may not be producing better code, researchers warn. And that could cause problems down the road for them.
items.reason: AI Coding 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: So you’ve heard these AI terms and nodded along; let’s fix that
items.summary: The rise of AI has brought an avalanche of new terms and slang. Here is a glossary with definitions of some of the most important words and phrases you might encounter.
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: What happens when companies become too AI-pilled?
items.summary: The people deciding that AI can replace your job are also the ones least likely to understand what your job truly involves, according to Box founder Aaron Levie, who pointed to this as an example of “AI psychosis.” Indeed, ClickUp recently cut 22% of its workforce for AI agents, tech layoffs i
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。

items.title: Startup offers free home cleaning—if it can record it all for robot training
items.summary: The latest twist in paying humans to wear head cameras for robot training data.
items.reason: 具身智能领域重要进展，具身智能商业化加速。

items.title: LLMs believe false statements even after explicit warnings that they're false
items.summary: Fine-tuning tests show "bias... toward confidently representing the claims as true."
items.reason: AI 领域重要动态，来自一线科技媒体的深度报道。
